name: scopeguard
description: ScopeGuard — AI scope creep detector for freelancers

scripts.build: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently --names "api,ui" --prefix-colors "blue,green" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.scrape: node scripts/reddit-scraper.js && node scripts/generate-articles.js && node scripts/update-blog.js
